title: magnoliaceae
intro: The rank of Magnoliaceae refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that comprises a diverse range of species, including trees, shrubs, and vines, which are commonly known as magnolias. This family is characterized by their showy, fragrant flowers and distinctive leaf shapes, often with large, lobed leaves. With over 200 species, the Magnoliaceae family is found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world, including Asia, North America, and the Caribbean.
